TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_smlalu', title = smlalu', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/smlalu'} }

S.FORM: smlalu' qutux qutux sr'ux na 'tayal ga kya kwara' lalu' ta', anaga kya Gaga nqu smlalu', ini si hmci . knayril hiya ga siki qngzyat mqumah, tminun ru mlahang qutux ngasal , nanu yasa qu smlalu' 'laqi knayril ga, mutux naha s'agal squ lalu na kk'man ini'ga Wagi,Bzyacing ru Bzngah. mzyay'a su nqu Wasiq, Umas, Tawyu, Yabung, Sugi... kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu' na kinbkaysan, iyan nqu Amuy, Maya', Lawa', Pisuy, Yarim, Yayut, Pitay, Ciwas, Yasil, Yagu' Rimuy, Yuma', Atay, Lalum, Simuy, Sawnun, Tapas, Paypay... mlikuy hiya ga siki si kint'tu' mtzyuwaw, qmalup,tmbbahu, rranga' nya qutux nya ngasal, nanu yasa qu mutux naha sllwan nqu lalu na qqhuniq. iyan nqu Bsyal,Pihaw,Hayung,Bawxil,Baysu',Qaysu',Yumin... kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu' na kinbkaysan , iyan nqu Bawnay, Watan,Yukih,Syat,Walis,Bayhuy,Yukan,Tlaw,Yupas,Iban,Piling,Kagi'...

smlalu' qutux qutux sr'ux na 'tayal ga kya kwara' lalu' ta', anaga kya Gaga nqu smlalu', ini si hmci . knayril hiya ga siki qngzyat mqumah, tminun ru mlahang qutux ngasal , nanu yasa qu smlalu' 'laqi knayril ga, mutux naha s'agal squ lalu na kk'man ini'ga Wagi,Bzyacing ru Bzngah. mzyay'a su nqu Wasiq, Umas, Tawyu, Yabung, Sugi... kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu' na kinbkaysan, iyan nqu Amuy, Maya', Lawa', Pisuy, Yarim, Yayut, Pitay, Ciwas, Yasil, Yagu' Rimuy, Yuma', Atay, Lalum, Simuy, Sawnun, Tapas, Paypay... mlikuy hiya ga siki si kint'tu' mtzyuwaw, qmalup,tmbbahu, rranga' nya qutux nya ngasal, nanu yasa qu mutux naha sllwan nqu lalu na qqhuniq. iyan nqu Bsyal,Pihaw,Hayung,Bawxil,Baysu',Qaysu',Yumin... kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu' na kinbkaysan , iyan nqu Bawnay, Watan,Yukih,Syat,Walis,Bayhuy,Yukan,Tlaw,Yupas,Iban,Piling,Kagi'...
S.PHON: s~…ēmlalu Ē qutux qutux s~…ēr Ēux na Ētajal …£a kja kwara Ē lalu Ē ta Ē, ana…£a kja …£a…£a nqu s~…ēmlalu Ē, ini s~…ēi ńßm ¶~ ®i . knajril ńßija …£a s~…ēiki qŇčzjat mqumańß, tminun ru mlańßaŇč qutux Ňčas~…ēal , nanu jas~…ēa qu s~…ēmlalu Ē Ēlaqi knajril …£a, mutux nańßa s~…ē Ēa…£al s~…ēqu lalu na kk Ēman ini Ē…£a wa…£i,ő≤zja ¶~ ®iŇč ru ő≤zŇčańß. mzjaj Ēa s~…ēu nqu was~…ēiq, umas~…ē, tawju, jaő≤uŇč, s~…ēu…£i... kja uzi qu Ēna…£al nańßa s~…ēqu lalu Ē na kinő≤kajs~…ēan, ijan nqu amuj, maja Ē, lawa Ē, pis~…ēuj, jarim, jajut, pitaj, ¶~ ®iwas~…ē, jas~…ēil, ja…£u Ē rimuj, juma Ē, ataj, lalum, s~…ēimuj, s~…ēawnun, tapas~…ē, pajpaj... mlikuj ńßija …£a s~…ēiki s~…ēi kint Ētu Ē mtzjuwaw, qmalup,tmő≤ő≤ańßu, rraŇča Ē nja qutux nja Ňčas~…ēal, nanu jas~…ēa qu mutux nańßa s~…ēllwan nqu lalu na qqńßuniq. ijan nqu ő≤s~…ējal,pińßaw,ńßajuŇč,ő≤awxil,ő≤ajs~…ēu Ē,qajs~…ēu Ē,jumin... kja uzi qu Ēna…£al nańßa s~…ēqu lalu Ē na kinő≤kajs~…ēan , ijan nqu ő≤awnaj, watan,jukińß,s~…ējat,walis~…ē,ő≤ajńßuj,jukan,tlaw,jupas~…ē,iő≤an,piliŇč,ka…£i Ē...
